tools.name: search_jobs
tools.description: Search live, normalized job postings across 30+ sources by title, skill/tech, country, remote, seniority, employment type and recency. Returns guidance for calling the authenticated REST API that runs the query.

tools.name: list_job_sources
tools.description: List the ATS and job-board sources JobsPipe normalizes into a single JSON schema, with coverage and freshness notes.

tools.name: list_pricing_plans
tools.description: List JobsPipe pricing plans with monthly price in USD, request quota and included features.

tools.name: search_upwork_jobs
tools.description: Search live Upwork job postings ingested by JobsPipe. Returns normalized rows with budget, skills and client signals.
